description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It's a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and backpacks. At American Tourister we are proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion. Height: 45 cmWidth: 27 cmDepth: 19 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartmentOne zipped compartment on the front with mesh organiser pouches Two mesh bottle holders on the sidesPadded haul loop for easy carryingTwo adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester and mesh panels at the back for breathable comfortBranded zips and branding appliqué d on the front Back padding for comfortCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
